title: Omnia
description: A small, yet powerful library for assisting with data generation.
body:
# Omnia!
Omnia is a simple, and powerful Fabric modding library to assist developers with the built-in data generation system.

Omnia offers the ability to more easily generate more complex files, including:
- Damage Types
- Enchantments
- Banner Patterns
- Armor Trim Materials
- Armor Trims
- Jukebox Songs
- Painting Variants
- Dimension Types

And more to come!

Omnia aims to make the process of using data-generation more effective and simple for all needs.

Omnia allows for beginner-friendly usage of the Dynamic Registries system as well, through the `DataInitializer`.

For more information, see the Wiki page!
